subcodes.first_line: Ponder thou upon the former party, how a group of the heedless, with turbans white and green, led the servants astray [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در حزب قبل تفکر نما جمعی غافلین با عمامهای بیضا و خضرا عباد را گمراه نموده اند
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
